products.title: Lion's Mane Mushroom
products.alt: Lion's Mane Mushroom — white fluffy fungus
products.description: Supports cognitive function, memory, and nerve growth factor production.

expand.about: Organic Lion's Mane mushroom extract standardised for active compounds. Stimulates Nerve Growth Factor (NGF) production, supporting neuroplasticity, memory, and long-term brain health.

products.title: Brain & Focus Formula
products.alt: Brain and focus nootropic supplement capsules
products.description: Comprehensive nootropic blend for sharper cognitive performance.

expand.about: A multi-ingredient cognitive formula combining proven nootropics to support focus, mental clarity, and processing speed. Designed for students, professionals, and anyone who needs sustained brainpower.

products.title: Mushroom Focus Strips
products.description: Fast-dissolving strips with mushroom extracts for on-the-go focus.

expand.about: Convenient oral strips infused with functional mushroom extracts. Dissolves on the tongue for fast absorption — perfect for pre-study sessions or before important meetings.

products.title: Cognitive Relax Strips
products.description: Calm focus strips that sharpen the mind without overstimulation.

expand.about: A unique combination of calming and cognitive-enhancing ingredients in a fast-dissolving strip. Promotes a state of relaxed alertness — perfect for focus without the jitters.

products.title: Focus Powder
products.description: Sour grape flavoured powder for sustained mental performance.

expand.about: A flavoured nootropic powder designed for pre-study or pre-work sessions. Mix with water for a delicious sour grape drink that primes your brain for deep work.

products.title: Creatine Monohydrate
products.alt: Creatine powder scoop for gym performance
products.description: The most researched supplement for strength and power output.

expand.about: Pure creatine monohydrate — the gold standard backed by over 500 peer-reviewed studies. Increases phosphocreatine stores in muscles, providing more ATP energy during high-intensity exercise.

products.title: Ashwagandha
products.description: Reduces cortisol, supports recovery, and improves sleep quality.

expand.about: A powerful adaptogenic herb clinically shown to reduce cortisol levels by up to 30%. Supports stress resilience, muscle recovery, and restful sleep — making it a must-have for active lifestyles.

products.title: L-Citrulline & L-Arginine Stack
products.description: Boosts blood flow for better pumps and workout performance.

expand.about: A synergistic stack of L-Citrulline and L-Arginine — two amino acids that boost nitric oxide production. Improves blood flow, nutrient delivery to muscles, and workout endurance.

products.title: Creatine Hydration Powder
products.description: Creatine combined with electrolytes for performance and hydration.

expand.about: Combines creatine monohydrate with essential electrolytes for dual-action performance support. Stay hydrated while fuelling your muscles during intense training sessions.

products.title: Nitric Shock Pre-Workout
products.description: Full-spectrum pre-workout for explosive energy and pump.

expand.about: A comprehensive pre-workout formula with nitric oxide boosters, energy compounds, and focus enhancers. Fruit punch flavour designed to fuel your most intense training sessions.

products.title: Colostrum Powder
products.description: Supports recovery, gut health, and immune function for athletes.

expand.about: Bovine colostrum is nature's first superfood — rich in immunoglobulins, growth factors, and bioactive compounds. Supports gut health, immune function, and athletic recovery.

products.title: Whey Protein Isolate
products.description: Premium chocolate whey isolate for lean muscle growth.

expand.about: 100% whey protein isolate with minimal fat and lactose. 25g of protein per serving with a complete amino acid profile to support muscle protein synthesis and recovery.

products.title: Magnesium Glycinate
products.description: Promotes deep relaxation and restful sleep.

expand.about: Magnesium chelated with glycine for maximum bioavailability and gentle absorption. Most people are deficient — this form is the easiest on the stomach and most effective for relaxation and sleep quality.

products.title: Sleep Formula
products.alt: Night sky moon — sleep and calm
products.description: A dedicated sleep blend for falling asleep faster and staying asleep.

expand.about: A comprehensive sleep support formula combining clinically studied ingredients that promote relaxation, reduce time to fall asleep, and improve overall sleep quality without next-day grogginess.

products.title: Ashwagandha Plus
products.description: Enhanced ashwagandha formula for stress relief and better sleep.

expand.about: An enhanced ashwagandha formula with additional calming compounds. Targets the stress-sleep connection by lowering cortisol levels, promoting relaxation, and improving sleep onset.

products.title: Energy Strips
products.description: Fast-dissolving energy strips for on-the-go mental and physical energy.

expand.about: Convenient oral strips that dissolve on the tongue for rapid energy delivery. Combines natural caffeine with B vitamins and adaptogens for clean, sustained energy without the crash.

products.title: Energy Powder
products.description: Guava berry pre-workout energy powder for sustained performance.

expand.about: A clean energy powder designed for pre-workout or anytime sustained energy. Guava berry flavour with natural caffeine, B vitamins, and amino acids for a smooth energy boost.

products.title: Beetroot
products.description: Natural nitric oxide booster for stamina and blood flow.

expand.about: Concentrated beetroot extract rich in dietary nitrates, which convert to nitric oxide in the body. Improves blood flow, oxygen delivery, and exercise endurance naturally.

products.title: Beetroot Powder
products.description: Pure beetroot powder for endurance and natural energy.

expand.about: 100% organic beetroot powder — a concentrated source of dietary nitrates. Mix into smoothies, water, or juice for a natural pre-workout that boosts endurance and oxygen efficiency.

products.title: Mushroom Complex 10X
products.description: 10 functional mushrooms for energy, immunity, and adaptogenic support.

expand.about: A comprehensive blend of 10 functional mushrooms including Lion's Mane, Reishi, Cordyceps, Chaga, and more. Provides broad-spectrum adaptogenic support for energy, immunity, and overall vitality.

products.title: Complete Multivitamin
products.description: Full-spectrum daily multivitamin covering all essential nutrients.

expand.about: A comprehensive daily multivitamin with all essential vitamins and minerals in bioavailable forms. Fills nutritional gaps from modern diets and supports overall health and vitality.

products.title: Vitamin D3 2,000 IU
products.description: Essential sunshine vitamin for immunity, bones, and mood.

expand.about: Vitamin D3 (cholecalciferol) — the most bioavailable form of vitamin D. Most people are deficient, especially during autumn and winter. Supports immune function, bone health, and mood regulation.

products.title: Gut Health
products.description: Comprehensive gut support for digestion and microbiome balance.

expand.about: A multi-action gut health formula that supports digestive function, microbiome diversity, and gut lining integrity. A healthy gut is the foundation of overall wellness, immunity, and even mood.

products.title: Probiotic 40 Billion
products.description: High-strength probiotic with prebiotics for gut and immune health.

expand.about: 40 billion CFU multi-strain probiotic with added prebiotics for maximum effectiveness. Supports digestive health, immune function, and nutrient absorption with clinically studied strains.

products.title: Sea Moss
products.description: Nutrient-dense superfood with 92 essential minerals.

expand.about: Irish sea moss (Chondrus crispus) contains 92 of the 102 minerals the body needs. A trending superfood that supports thyroid function, digestion, and immune health with a dense mineral profile.

products.title: Platinum Turmeric
products.description: High-potency turmeric with enhanced bioavailability for inflammation.

expand.about: Premium turmeric extract with enhanced bioavailability for maximum anti-inflammatory effects. Curcumin, the active compound, supports joint health, recovery, and overall wellness.

products.title: Collagen Peptides
products.description: Grass-fed hydrolyzed collagen for skin, joints, and gut health.

expand.about: 100% grass-fed, hydrolyzed collagen peptides for maximum absorption. Supports skin elasticity, joint flexibility, and gut lining integrity. Type I and III collagen — the most abundant types in the human body.

products.title: Ginkgo Biloba + Ginseng
products.description: Traditional nootropic duo for mental sharpness and cerebral blood flow.

expand.about: A time-tested combination of Ginkgo Biloba and Panax Ginseng. Ginkgo improves cerebral blood flow and oxygen delivery to the brain, while Ginseng enhances mental performance and reduces fatigue.

products.title: Hydration Powder
products.description: Lemonade-flavoured electrolyte powder for optimal hydration during training.

expand.about: A refreshing lemonade-flavoured electrolyte powder formulated for athletes. Replenishes sodium, potassium, magnesium, and other minerals lost through sweat during intense training sessions.

products.title: Plant Protein
products.description: Vanilla plant-based protein blend for vegan athletes and muscle recovery.

expand.about: A smooth vanilla plant-based protein powder combining pea, rice, and hemp proteins for a complete amino acid profile. Ideal for vegan athletes or anyone who prefers plant-based nutrition.

products.title: L-Glutamine Powder
products.description: Supports muscle recovery, gut health, and immune function after training.

expand.about: Pure L-Glutamine — the most abundant amino acid in muscle tissue. Intense training depletes glutamine stores, slowing recovery and weakening immune function. Replenishing it accelerates muscle repair and supports gut barrier integrity.

products.title: Joint Support
products.description: Comprehensive joint formula for mobility, flexibility, and pain relief.

expand.about: A comprehensive joint health formula combining glucosamine, chondroitin, MSM, and anti-inflammatory botanicals. Supports cartilage repair, reduces stiffness, and keeps joints flexible for active lifestyles.

products.title: Chaga Mushroom
products.description: Calming adaptogenic mushroom for relaxation and immune support.

expand.about: Wild-harvested Chaga mushroom extract — one of nature's most potent adaptogens. Supports immune function, reduces oxidative stress, and promotes a calm, balanced state that helps prepare the body for restful sleep.

products.title: Moringa Pure
products.description: Nutrient-dense superfood leaf for natural energy and vitality.

expand.about: 100% pure Moringa oleifera leaf — packed with vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants. Known as the 'miracle tree,' Moringa provides natural, sustained energy from its rich nutrient density rather than stimulants.
benefits: Rich in iron and B vitamins

products.title: Energy Powder (Lychee)
products.description: Lychee-flavoured clean energy powder for all-day performance.

expand.about: A refreshing lychee-flavoured energy powder with natural caffeine, B vitamins, and amino acids. Provides clean, sustained energy without the crash — perfect as a pre-workout or afternoon pick-me-up.

products.title: Berberine
products.description: Supports healthy blood sugar, metabolism, and cardiovascular health.

expand.about: Berberine is a bioactive compound found in several plants. Clinically studied for its ability to support healthy blood sugar levels, improve insulin sensitivity, and support cardiovascular health. Often called 'nature's metformin.'

products.title: Resveratrol 50% 600mg
products.description: Potent antioxidant for anti-aging, heart health, and cellular protection.

expand.about: High-potency Resveratrol standardised to 50% trans-resveratrol. A powerful polyphenol found in red grapes, studied for its anti-aging, cardiovascular, and neuroprotective properties. Activates sirtuins — the longevity genes.

products.title: Liver Support
products.description: Supports liver detoxification and healthy liver function.

expand.about: A comprehensive liver health formula with milk thistle, NAC, and artichoke extract. Supports your body's natural detoxification pathways, protects liver cells from oxidative damage, and promotes healthy bile production.

products.title: Digestive + Gut Health Strips
products.description: Fast-dissolving strips with probiotics and digestive enzymes.

expand.about: Convenient oral strips that combine probiotics with digestive enzymes for on-the-go gut support. Dissolve on the tongue after meals to aid digestion, reduce bloating, and support microbiome balance.

products.title: Hair, Skin & Nails Essentials
products.description: Biotin, keratin, and vitamins for healthy hair, glowing skin, and strong nails.

expand.about: A targeted beauty-from-within formula with biotin, keratin, vitamin E, and zinc. Supports healthy hair growth, skin elasticity, and nail strength from the inside out.
